metadata.title: Meta Bind
metadata.description: Make your notes interactive with inline input fields, metadata displays, and buttons.

regex.source: Notice("meta-bind | Error while running button action. Check the console for details.")
regex.target: Notice("meta-bind | 执行按钮操作时出错。请查看控制台获取详细信息。")

regex.target: Notice("复制图片路径到剪贴板失败")

regex.source: Notice("meta-bind | Dataview needs to be installed and enabled to use suggest option queries. Check the console for more information.")
regex.target: Notice("meta-bind | 使用建议选项查询需安装并启用Dataview插件。请查看控制台获取更多信息。")

regex.target: Notice("meta-bind | 无法解析按钮配置。请检查按钮语法。查看控制台获取详细信息。")
name:"如果笔记已存在则打开"

description:"The file name of the new note."

regex.target: description:"此操作运行后是否打开新笔记。"

regex.source: description:"Whether to open the note instead of creating a new one if the note already exists."
regex.target: description:"如果笔记已存在，是否打开该笔记而不是创建一个新笔记。"

regex.source: description:"The text to input at the cursor."
description:"The line number to insert at."
description:"The text to insert into the note."

regex.source: description:"Whether to open the link in a new tab."
regex.target: description:"是否在新标签中打开链接。"

regex.target: description:"此正则表达式的正则表达式标志。"

regex.source: description:"The text to replace the button with."
description:"The line that marks the start of the area to replace."
regex.target: description:"标记要替换区域开始的行。"

regex.source: description:"The line that marks the end of the area to replace."
regex.target: description:"标记要替换区域结束的行。"

regex.source: description:"The text to replace the note section."
description:"The text to replace the match with."
regex.target: description:"用来替换匹配项的文本。"

regex.source: description:"The time to sleep in milliseconds."
regex.target: description:"休眠时间（以毫秒为单位）。"

regex.source: description:"The template file to create a new note of."
regex.target: description:"用于创建新笔记的模板文件。"

regex.source: description:"The metadata property in form of a bind target."
regex.target: description:"以绑定目标形式的元数据属性。"

regex.source: description:"Whether to evaluate the value as a JS expression."
regex.target: description:"是否将值评估为JS表达式。"

regex.source: description:"The label shown on the button."
description:"The icon shown on the button. If left empty, no icon will show"
regex.target: description:"按钮上显示的图标。如果留空，则不显示图标"

regex.source: description:"The style variant of the button"
description:"A list of CSS classes to add to the button. Multiple classes should be separated by a space."
regex.target: description:"要添加到按钮的CSS类列表。多个类应以空格分隔。"

regex.source: description:"A tooltip to show when hovering the button. If not set, the button label will be shown instead."
regex.target: description:"当鼠标悬停在按钮上时显示的工具提示。如果未设置，将显示按钮标签。"

regex.source: description:"An ID that allows the button to be referenced in inline buttons."
regex.target: description:"允许在内联按钮中引用的ID。"

regex.source: description:"Whether to not render this button. This can be useful when using inline buttons."
regex.target: description:"是否不渲染此按钮。这在使用内联按钮时可能很有用。"

regex.source: text:"The following errors were detected during dependency validation. The plugin won't load until these errors have been resolved. Please install the required plugins and restart Obsidian."
regex.target: text:"在依赖验证期间检测到以下错误。插件在解决这些错误之前不会加载。请安装所需的插件并重新启动Obsidian。"

regex.source: text:"[META_BIND] This folder has been excluded in the settings"
regex.target: text:"[META_BIND] 此文件夹已在设置中排除"

regex.source: text:`You are using a ${this.plugin.build} build (${this.plugin.manifest.version}). This build is not intended for production use. Use at your own risk.`
regex.target: text:`您正在使用 ${this.plugin.build} 版本 (${this.plugin.manifest.version})。该版本不适合生产使用。请自担风险。`

regex.source: .setDesc("Enable syntax highlighting for meta bind syntax. RESTART REQUIRED.")
regex.target: .setDesc("启用Meta Bind语法的语法高亮。需要重启。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Enable a meta bind menu section in the editor right-click menu. RESTART REQUIRED.")
regex.target: .setDesc("在编辑器右键菜单中启用Meta Bind菜单部分。需要重启。")

regex.source: .setDesc("You can specify input field templates here, and access them using `INPUT[template_name][overrides (optional)]` in your notes.")
regex.target: .setDesc("您可以在这里指定输入字段模板，并在您的笔记中使用 `INPUT[template_name][overrides (optional)]` 进行访问。")

regex.source: .setDesc("You can specify button field templates here, and access them in inline buttons.")
regex.target: .setDesc("您可以在这里指定按钮字段模板，并在内联按钮中访问它们。")

regex.source: .setDesc("You can specify excluded folders here. The plugin will not work within excluded folders.")
regex.target: .setDesc("您可以在这里指定排除的文件夹。插件在排除的文件夹内将无法工作。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Display nothing instead of null, if the frontmatter value is empty, in text view fields.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果前置信息值为空，则在文本视图字段中显示为空，而不是显示null。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Enable features that run user written JavaScript. This is potentially DANGEROUS, thus it's disabled by default. RESTART REQUIRED.")
regex.target: .setDesc("启用运行用户编写的JavaScript的功能。这可能是危险的，因此默认情况下禁用。需要重启。")

regex.source: .setDesc("The date format to be used by this plugin. Changing this setting will break the parsing of existing date inputs. Here is a list of all available date tokes https://momentjs.com/docs/#/displaying/.")
regex.target: .setDesc("此插件使用的日期格式。更改此设置将破坏现有日期输入的解析。以下是所有可用日期令牌的列表 https://momentjs.com/docs/#/displaying/。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Specify the first weekday for the datepicker.")
.setDesc("Enable dev mode. Not recommended unless you want to debug this plugin.")
regex.target: .setDesc("启用开发模式。不建议使用，除非您想调试此插件。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Disable restrictions on which input fields can be created in which code blocks. Not recommended unless you know what you are doing.")
regex.target: .setDesc("禁用对在哪些代码块中可以创建输入字段的限制。不建议使用，除非您知道自己在做什么。")

regex.source: .setDesc(`The interval in milli-seconds between disk writes. Changing this number is not recommended except if your hard drive is exceptionally slow. Standard: ${go.syncInterval}; Minimum: ${go.minSyncInterval}; Maximum: ${go.maxSyncInterval}`)
regex.target: .setDesc(`磁盘写入之间的毫秒间隔。更改此数字不建议，除非您的硬盘非常慢。标准：${go.syncInterval}; 最小：${go.minSyncInterval}; 最大：${go.maxSyncInterval}`)

regex.source: cause:"source 'scope' should have no cache items or subscriptions"
regex.target: cause:"源 'scope' 应该没有缓存项或订阅"

regex.source: cause:`Attempted to access dependency ${e} which is not a listed dependency. Please report this error.`
regex.target: cause:`尝试访问的依赖项 ${e} 未列为依赖项，请报告此错误。`

regex.source: cause:`Plugin ${e} is required, but not installed. Please install the plugin.`
regex.target: cause:`需要插件 ${e}，但未安装。请安装该插件。`

regex.source: cause:`Plugin ${e.pluginId} is outdated. Required version is at least ${e.minVersion}, installed version is ${t}. Please update the plugin.`
regex.target: cause:`插件 ${e.pluginId} 已过时。要求的版本至少为 ${e.minVersion}，安装的版本为 ${t}。请更新插件。`

regex.source: cause:`Plugin ${e.pluginId} is too new. Required version is lower than ${e.maxVersion}, installed version is ${t}. Please downgrade the plugin.`
regex.target: cause:`插件 ${e.pluginId} 版本过高。要求的版本低于 ${e.maxVersion}，安装的版本为 ${t}。请降级插件。`

regex.target: cause:"插件设置中禁用了JS评估。"

regex.target: 无法解析绑定目标。绑定目标存储类型 'global_memory' 不支持存储路径。

regex.target: 无法解析绑定目标。绑定目标存储类型 'scope' 不支持存储路径。

regex.target: 无法解析绑定目标范围，未提供范围。

regex.source: `Encountered invalid identifier. Expected token to be a storage type but received '${e?.value}'.`

regex.target: 导致字段创建失败的错误。有时一个错误的发生只是因为另一个错误。

regex.target: description:"计算 a 模 b 的（模）乘法逆元。方程 ax ≡ 1 (mod b) 的解。"

regex.source: warningText:"Warnings will not cause the creation of a field to fail, but they indicate that a part of the declaration was invalid or uses deprecated functionality."
regex.target: warningText:"警告不会导致字段创建失败，但它们表明声明的某部分无效或使用了已弃用的功能。"
